Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*******************************************************************************

 Cartesian  objects

 We define the notions of cartesian objects internal to
 arbitrary bicategories. To define this notion, we use two steps. We first
 define objects 'with terminal objects' and objects 'with products'.

 Each of these concepts can be defined in 2 ways. We can use a representable
 variation or we use adjunctions. This is similar for categories: we can
 define whether a category has limits/colimits by saying that a certain functor
 has a right or a left adjoint.

 Contents
 1. The representable definition of cartesian objects
 2. Being cartesian is a proposition
 3. The definitions of cartesian objects via adjunctions
 4. Equivalence of the two definitions of cartesian object

 *******************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Initial.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Preservation.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat. Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.AdjointUnique.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.UnivalenceOp.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.Final.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.Products.

Local Open Scope cat.

(**
 1. The representable definition of cartesian objects
 *)
Definition cartesian_terminal
           {B : bicat}
           (b : B)
  : UU
  := (∏ (x : B), Terminal (hom x b))
     ×
     (∏ (x y : B) (f : x --> y), preserves_terminal (pre_comp b f)).

Definition cartesian_prod
           {B : bicat}
           (b : B)
  : UU
  := (∏ (x : B), BinProducts (hom x b))
     ×
     (∏ (x y : B) (f : x --> y), preserves_binproduct (pre_comp b f)).

Definition cartesian_ob
           {B : bicat}
           (b : B)
  : UU
  := cartesian_terminal b × cartesian_prod b.

(**
 2. Being cartesian is a proposition
 *)

B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (cartesian_terminal b)


B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (cartesian_terminal b)

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (∏ x : B, Terminal (hom x b))
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop
  (∏ (x y : B) (f : B ⟦ x, y ⟧),
   preserves_terminal (pre_comp b f))

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (∏ x : B, Terminal (hom x b))
 
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b, t: B
isofhlevel 1 ((λ t : B, Terminal (hom t b)) t)

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b, t: B
is_univalent (hom t b)

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b, t: B
is_univalent_2_1 B

    exact HB.
  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop
  (∏ (x y : B) (f : B ⟦ x, y ⟧),
   preserves_terminal (pre_comp b f))
 
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b, t, t0: B
t1: B ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t1 : B ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
    preserves_terminal (pre_comp b t1)) t1)

    apply isaprop_preserves_terminal.
Qed.


B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (cartesian_prod b)


B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (cartesian_prod b)

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (∏ x : B, BinProducts (hom x b))
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop
  (∏ (x y : B) (f : B ⟦ x, y ⟧),
   preserves_binproduct (pre_comp b f))

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (∏ x : B, BinProducts (hom x b))
 
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b, t: B
t0, t1: hom t b
isofhlevel 1 (BinProduct (hom t b) t0 t1)

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b, t: B
t0, t1: hom t b
is_univalent (hom t b)

    
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b, t: B
t0, t1: hom t b
is_univalent_2_1 B

    exact HB.
  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop
  (∏ (x y : B) (f : B ⟦ x, y ⟧),
   preserves_binproduct (pre_comp b f))
 
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b, t, t0: B
t1: B ⟦ t, t0 ⟧
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t1 : B ⟦ t, t0 ⟧,
    preserves_binproduct (pre_comp b t1)) t1)

    apply isaprop_preserves_binproduct.
Qed.


B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (cartesian_ob b)


B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (cartesian_ob b)

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (cartesian_terminal b)
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (cartesian_prod b)

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (cartesian_terminal b)
 
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
is_univalent_2_1 B

    exact HB.
  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
isaprop (cartesian_prod b)
 
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
b: B
is_univalent_2_1 B

    exact HB.
Qed.

(**
 3. The definitions of cartesian objects via adjunctions
 *)
Section CartesianViaAdjunction.
  Context {B : bicat}
          (b : B).

  Section Terminal.
    Context (T : bifinal_obj B).

    Let f : b --> pr1 T
      := is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b.

    Definition cartesian_terminal_via_adj
      : UU
      := left_adjoint f.

    
B: bicat
b: B
T: bifinal_obj B
f:= is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b: B ⟦ b, pr1 T ⟧
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
isaprop cartesian_terminal_via_adj

    
B: bicat
b: B
T: bifinal_obj B
f:= is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b: B ⟦ b, pr1 T ⟧
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
isaprop cartesian_terminal_via_adj

      
B: bicat
b: B
T: bifinal_obj B
f:= is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b: B ⟦ b, pr1 T ⟧
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
is_univalent_2_1 B

      exact HB.
    Qed.
  End Terminal.

  Section Prod.
    Context (prod : has_binprod B).

    Let δ : b --> pr1 (prod b b)
      := binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b).

    Definition cartesian_prod_via_adj
      : UU
      := left_adjoint δ.

    
B: bicat
b: B
prod: has_binprod B
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
isaprop cartesian_prod_via_adj

    
B: bicat
b: B
prod: has_binprod B
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
isaprop cartesian_prod_via_adj

      
B: bicat
b: B
prod: has_binprod B
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
is_univalent_2_1 B

      exact HB.
    Qed.
  End Prod.

  Section Cartesian.
    Context (T : bifinal_obj B)
            (prod : has_binprod B).

    Definition cartesian_ob_via_adj
      : UU
      := cartesian_terminal_via_adj T × cartesian_prod_via_adj prod.

    
B: bicat
b: B
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
isaprop cartesian_ob_via_adj

    
B: bicat
b: B
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
isaprop cartesian_ob_via_adj

      
B: bicat
b: B
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
isaprop (cartesian_terminal_via_adj T)
B: bicat
b: B
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
isaprop (cartesian_prod_via_adj prod)

      
B: bicat
b: B
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
isaprop (cartesian_terminal_via_adj T)
 
B: bicat
b: B
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
is_univalent_2_1 B

        exact HB.
      
B: bicat
b: B
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
isaprop (cartesian_prod_via_adj prod)
 
B: bicat
b: B
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
is_univalent_2_1 B

        exact HB.
    Qed.
  End Cartesian.
End CartesianViaAdjunction.

(**
4. Equivalence of the two definitions of cartesian object
 *)
Section EquivalenceCartesian.
  Context {B : bicat}
          (T : bifinal_obj B)
          (prod : has_binprod B)
          (b : B).

  Section ToAdj.
    Context (Hb : cartesian_terminal b).

    Let term : Terminal (hom (pr1 T) b) := pr1 Hb (pr1 T).

    Let l : b --> pr1 T := is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b.
    Let r : pr1 T --> b := pr1 term.

    Local Definition cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_unit
      : id₁ b ==> l · r
      := TerminalArrow (_ ,, pr2 Hb _ _ l _ (pr2 term)) (id₁ b).

    Let η : id₁ b ==> l · r
      := cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_unit.

    Local Definition cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_counit
      : r · l ==> id₁ (pr1 T)
      := is_bifinal_2cell_property (pr2 T) (pr1 T) (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 T)).

    Let ε : r · l ==> id₁ (pr1 T)
      := cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_counit.

    
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_terminal b
term:= pr1 Hb (pr1 T): Terminal (hom (pr1 T) b)
l:= is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b: B ⟦ b, pr1 T ⟧
r:= pr1 term: B ⟦ pr1 T, b ⟧
η:= cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_unit: id₁ b ==> l · r
ε:= cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_counit: r · l ==> id₁ (pr1 T)
cartesian_terminal_via_adj b T

    
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_terminal b
term:= pr1 Hb (pr1 T): Terminal (hom (pr1 T) b)
l:= is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b: B ⟦ b, pr1 T ⟧
r:= pr1 term: B ⟦ pr1 T, b ⟧
η:= cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_unit: id₁ b ==> l · r
ε:= cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_counit: r · l ==> id₁ (pr1 T)
cartesian_terminal_via_adj b T

b: B

r:= pr1 term: B ⟦ pr1 T, b ⟧
η:= cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_unit: id₁ b ==> l · r
ε:= cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_counit: r · l ==> id₁ (pr1 T)
B ⟦ pr1 T, b ⟧

η:= cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_unit: id₁ b ==> l · r

id₁ b ==> is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b · ?pr1
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_terminal b
term:= pr1 Hb (pr1 T): Terminal (hom (pr1 T) b)
l:= is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b: B ⟦ b, pr1 T ⟧
r:= pr1 term: B ⟦ pr1 T, b ⟧
η:= cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_unit: id₁ b ==> l · r
ε:= cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_counit: r · l ==> id₁ (pr1 T)
(λ _ : id₁ b ==>
       is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b · ?pr1,
 ?pr1 · is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b ==>
 id₁ (pr1 T)) ?pr10
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_terminal b
term:= pr1 Hb (pr1 T): Terminal (hom (pr1 T) b)
l:= is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b: B ⟦ b, pr1 T ⟧
r:= pr1 term: B ⟦ pr1 T, b ⟧
η:= cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_unit: id₁ b ==> l · r
ε:= cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_counit: r · l ==> id₁ (pr1 T)
(((linvunitor (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b)
   • (left_adjoint_unit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)
      ▹ is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b))
  • rassociator (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b)
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
         (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))
      (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b))
 • (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b
    ◃ left_adjoint_counit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)))
• runitor (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b) =
id₂ (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b)

T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_terminal b

l:= is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b: B ⟦ b, pr1 T ⟧
r:= pr1 term: B ⟦ pr1 T, b ⟧
η:= cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_unit: id₁ b ==> l · r
ε:= cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_counit: r · l ==> id₁ (pr1 T)
(λ _ : (((linvunitor
            (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b)

       id₂ (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b),
 (((rinvunitor
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
         (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))
    • (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
         (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)
       ◃ left_adjoint_unit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)))
   • lassociator
       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
          (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))
       (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b)
       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
          (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)))
  • (left_adjoint_counit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)
     ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint
         (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)))
 • lunitor
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)) =
 id₂
   (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)))
  ?pr11

      
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_terminal b
term:= pr1 Hb (pr1 T): Terminal (hom (pr1 T) b)
l:= is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b: B ⟦ b, pr1 T ⟧
r:= pr1 term: B ⟦ pr1 T, b ⟧
η:= cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_unit: id₁ b ==> l · r
ε:= cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_counit: r · l ==> id₁ (pr1 T)
B ⟦ pr1 T, b ⟧
 exact r.
      
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_terminal b
term:= pr1 Hb (pr1 T): Terminal (hom (pr1 T) b)
l:= is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b: B ⟦ b, pr1 T ⟧
r:= pr1 term: B ⟦ pr1 T, b ⟧
η:= cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_unit: id₁ b ==> l · r
ε:= cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_counit: r · l ==> id₁ (pr1 T)
id₁ b ==> is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b · r
 exact η.
      
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_terminal b
term:= pr1 Hb (pr1 T): Terminal (hom (pr1 T) b)
l:= is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b: B ⟦ b, pr1 T ⟧
r:= pr1 term: B ⟦ pr1 T, b ⟧
η:= cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_unit: id₁ b ==> l · r
ε:= cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_counit: r · l ==> id₁ (pr1 T)
(λ _ : id₁ b ==>
       is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b · r,
 r · is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b ==>
 id₁ (pr1 T)) η
 exact ε.
      
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_terminal b
term:= pr1 Hb (pr1 T): Terminal (hom (pr1 T) b)
l:= is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b: B ⟦ b, pr1 T ⟧
r:= pr1 term: B ⟦ pr1 T, b ⟧
η:= cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_unit: id₁ b ==> l · r
ε:= cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_counit: r · l ==> id₁ (pr1 T)
(((linvunitor (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b)
   • (left_adjoint_unit (r,, η,, ε)
      ▹ is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b))
  • rassociator (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b)
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (r,, η,, ε))
      (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b))
 • (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b
    ◃ left_adjoint_counit (r,, η,, ε)))
• runitor (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b) =
id₂ (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b)
 apply (is_bifinal_eq_property (pr2 T)).
      
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_terminal b
term:= pr1 Hb (pr1 T): Terminal (hom (pr1 T) b)
l:= is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b: B ⟦ b, pr1 T ⟧
r:= pr1 term: B ⟦ pr1 T, b ⟧
η:= cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_unit: id₁ b ==> l · r
ε:= cartesian_terminal_to_cartesian_terminal_via_adj_counit: r · l ==> id₁ (pr1 T)
(λ _ : (((linvunitor
            (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b)
          • (left_adjoint_unit (r,, η,, ε)
             ▹ is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b))
         • rassociator
             (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b)
             (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (r,, η,, ε))
             (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b))
        • (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b
           ◃ left_adjoint_counit (r,, η,, ε)))
       • runitor (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b) =
       id₂ (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b),
 (((rinvunitor
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (r,, η,, ε))
    • (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (r,, η,, ε)
       ◃ left_adjoint_unit (r,, η,, ε)))
   • lassociator
       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (r,, η,, ε))
       (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b)
       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (r,, η,, ε)))
  • (left_adjoint_counit (r,, η,, ε)
     ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint (r,, η,, ε)))
 • lunitor (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (r,, η,, ε)) =
 id₂ (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (r,, η,, ε)))
  (is_bifinal_eq_property (pr2 T) b
     (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b)
     (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b)
     ((((linvunitor
           (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b)
         • (left_adjoint_unit (r,, η,, ε)
            ▹ is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b))
        • rassociator
            (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b)
            (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (r,, η,, ε))
            (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b))
       • (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b
          ◃ left_adjoint_counit (r,, η,, ε)))
      • runitor (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b))
     (id₂ (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b)))
 apply (@TerminalArrowEq _ term).
    Defined.
  End ToAdj.

  Section FromAdj.
    Context (Hb : cartesian_terminal_via_adj b T).

    Let l : b --> pr1 T := is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b.
    Let r : pr1 T --> b := left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hb).
    Let η : id₁ b ==> l · r := left_adjoint_unit (pr1 Hb).
    Let ε : r · l ==> id₁ (pr1 T) := left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hb).
    Let p
      : rinvunitor r • (r ◃ η) • lassociator r l r • (ε ▹ r) • lunitor r
        =
        id₂ r
      := internal_triangle2 (pr2 Hb).

    Definition cartesian_terminal_via_adj_to_cartesian_terminal_1cell
               (x : B)
      : x --> b
      := is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) x · r.

    Definition cartesian_terminal_via_adj_to_cartesian_terminal_2cell
               (x : B)
               (f : x --> b)
      : f ==> cartesian_terminal_via_adj_to_cartesian_terminal_1cell x
      := rinvunitor _
         • (_ ◃ η)
         • lassociator _ _ _
         • (is_bifinal_2cell_property (pr2 T) _ _ _ ▹ r).

        (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) x) r l ▹ r))
  • rassociator (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) x)
      (r · l) r)
 • (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) x ◃ (ε ▹ r)))
• (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) x ◃ lunitor r) =
(((((β ▹ l) ▹ r)
   • (rassociator
        (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) x) r l ▹ r))
  • rassociator (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) x)
      (r · l) r)
 • (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) x ◃ (ε ▹ r)))
• (is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) x ◃ lunitor r)

      
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_terminal_via_adj b T
l:= is_bifinal_1cell_property (pr2 T) b: B ⟦ b, pr1 T ⟧
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hb): B ⟦ pr1 T, b ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit (pr1 Hb): id₁ b ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hb): r · l ==> id₁ (pr1 T)
p:= internal_triangle2 (pr2 Hb): (((rinvunitor r • (r ◃ η)) • lassociator r l r)
 • (ε ▹ r)) • lunitor r = 
id₂ r
x: B
f: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
α, β: f ==>
cartesian_terminal_via_adj_to_cartesian_terminal_1cell
  x
(α ▹ l) ▹ r = (β ▹ l) ▹ r

T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
isaprop (cartesian_terminal_via_adj b T)
 
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
is_univalent_2_1 B

      exact HB.
  Defined.

  Section ToAdj.
    Context (Hb : cartesian_prod b).

    Let δ : b --> pr1 (prod b b)
      := binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b).

    Let product
      : BinProduct
          (hom (pr1 (prod b b)) b)
          (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
          (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
      := pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
                (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
                (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))).

    Let r : pr1 (prod b b) --> b
      := BinProductObject _ product.

    
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_prod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
product:= pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinProduct (hom (pr1 (prod b b)) b)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= product: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
id₁ b ==> δ · r

id₁ b ==> δ · r

T: bifinal_obj B

  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= product: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
hom b b ⟦ id₁ b,
pre_comp b δ (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))) ⟧

B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_prod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧

  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinProduct (hom (pr1 (prod b b)) b)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= product: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
hom b b ⟦ id₁ b,
pre_comp b δ (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))) ⟧
 exact ((binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b)) _ (id₁ b) (id₁ b))^-1).

T: bifinal_obj B

 exact ((binprod_ump_1cell_pr2 (pr2 (prod b b)) _ (id₁ b) (id₁ b))^-1).
    Defined.

    Let η : id₁ b ==> δ · r
      := cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_unit.

r · δ ==> id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))

 exact (rassociator _ _ _
               • (r ◃ binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b)) _ (id₁ b) (id₁ b))
               • runitor _

               • linvunitor _).

T: bifinal_obj B

b: B

  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinProduct (hom (pr1 (prod b b)) b)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= product: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧

r · δ · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)) ==>
id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))
· binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))
 exact (rassociator _ _ _
               • (r ◃ binprod_ump_1cell_pr2 (pr2 (prod b b)) _ (id₁ b) (id₁ b))
               • runitor _
               • BinProductPr2 _ product
               • linvunitor _).
    Defined.

    Let ε : r · δ ==> id₁ _
      := cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit.

    
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_prod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
product:= pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinProduct (hom (pr1 (prod b b)) b)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= product: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_unit: id₁ b ==> δ · r
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: r · δ ==> id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))
(((linvunitor δ • (η ▹ δ)) • rassociator δ r δ)
 • (δ ◃ ε)) • runitor δ = id₂ δ

B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_prod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
product:= pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinProduct (hom (pr1 (prod b b)) b)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))

ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: r · δ ==> id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))
((((linvunitor δ • (η ▹ δ)) • rassociator δ r δ)
  • (δ ◃ ε)) • runitor δ)
▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)) =
id₂ δ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))

B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_prod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
product:= pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinProduct (hom (pr1 (prod b b)) b)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= product: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_unit: id₁ b ==> δ · r
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: r · δ ==> id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))
?b = id₂ (δ · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))

        
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B

           (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
         • ((δ
             ◃ rassociator r
                 (binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b))
                    (id₁ b) (id₁ b))
                 (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))))
            • ((δ
                ◃ (r
                   ◃ binprod_ump_1cell_pr1
                       (pr2 (prod b b)) b (id₁ b)
                       (id₁ b)))
               • ((δ ◃ runitor r)
                  • (δ
                     ◃ BinProductPr1
                         (hom (pr1 (prod b b)) b)
                         product))))))) = ?b

          
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_prod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
product:= pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinProduct (hom (pr1 (prod b b)) b)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= product: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_unit: id₁ b ==> δ · r
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: r · δ ==> id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))
(rassociator δ r δ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
• (rassociator δ (r · δ)
     (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
   • ((δ
       ◃ rassociator r
           (binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b)
              (id₁ b))
           (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))))
      • ((δ
          ◃ (r
             ◃ binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b))
                 b (id₁ b) (id₁ b)))
         • ((δ ◃ runitor r)
            • (δ
               ◃ BinProductPr1
                   (hom (pr1 (prod b b)) b) product))))) =
?t2

B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_prod b

id₂ (δ · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))) =
id₂ (δ · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_prod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
product:= pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinProduct (hom (pr1 (prod b b)) b)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))

ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: r · δ ==> id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))
((((linvunitor δ • (η ▹ δ)) • rassociator δ r δ)
  • (δ ◃ ε)) • runitor δ)
▹ binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)) =
id₂ δ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))

                     ◃ BinProductPr2
                         (hom (pr1 (prod b b)) b)
                         product))))))) =
id₂ (δ · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))

T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_prod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
product:= pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinProduct (hom (pr1 (prod b b)) b)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))

η:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_unit: id₁ b ==> δ · r
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: r · δ ==> id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))
(linvunitor δ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
• (((η ▹ δ) ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
   • ((rassociator δ r δ
       ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))

           (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))

             ◃ rassociator r
                 (binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b))
                    (id₁ b) (id₁ b))
                 (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))))
            • ((δ
                ◃ (r
                   ◃ binprod_ump_1cell_pr2
                       (pr2 (prod b b)) b (id₁ b)
                       (id₁ b)))
               • ((δ ◃ runitor r)
                  • (δ
                     ◃ BinProductPr2
                         (hom (pr1 (prod b b)) b)
                         product))))))) = ?b

B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_prod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧

  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinProduct (hom (pr1 (prod b b)) b)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))

η:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_unit: id₁ b ==> δ · r
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: r · δ ==> id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))
id₂ (δ · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))) =
id₂ (δ · binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))

        apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_prod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧

  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinProduct (hom (pr1 (prod b b)) b)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= product: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_unit: id₁ b ==> δ · r
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: r · δ ==> id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))
(((rinvunitor r • (r ◃ η)) • lassociator r δ r)
 • (ε ▹ r)) • lunitor r = id₂ r

T: bifinal_obj B

b: B
Hb: cartesian_prod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
product:= pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinProduct (hom (pr1 (prod b b)) b)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= product: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_unit: id₁ b ==> δ · r
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: r · δ ==> id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))
(((rinvunitor r • (r ◃ η)) • lassociator r δ r)
 • (ε ▹ r)) • lunitor r = id₂ r

b: B

  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))

ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: r · δ ==> id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))

       ◃ (δ

Hb: cartesian_prod b
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
product:= pr1 Hb (pr1 (prod b b))
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinProduct (hom (pr1 (prod b b)) b)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= product: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_unit: id₁ b ==> δ · r
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: r · δ ==> id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))
rinvunitor r
• ((r
    ◃ (binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b)) b
         (id₁ b) (id₁ b)) ^-1)
   • (lassociator r δ
        (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
      • (rassociator r
           (binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b)
              (id₁ b))
           (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
         • ((r
             ◃ binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b))
                 b (id₁ b) (id₁ b))
            • (runitor r
               • (BinProductPr1
                    (hom (pr1 (prod b b)) b) product
                  • (linvunitor
                       (binprod_cone_pr1
                          (pr1 (prod b b)))
                     • lunitor
                         (binprod_cone_pr1
                            (pr1 (prod b b)))))))))) =
?b

  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))): BinProduct (hom (pr1 (prod b b)) b)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))
  (binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)))
r:= product: B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_unit: id₁ b ==> δ · r
ε:= cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_counit: r · δ ==> id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))
?b = BinProductPr2 (hom (pr1 (prod b b)) b) product

  (binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))

 exact cartesian_prod_to_cartesian_prod_via_adj_triangle2.
    Defined.
  End ToAdj.

  Section FromAdj.
    Context (Hb : cartesian_prod_via_adj b prod).

    Let δ : b --> pr1 (prod b b)
      := binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b).
    Let r : pr1 (prod b b) --> b := left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hb).
    Let η : id₁ b ==> δ · r := left_adjoint_unit (pr1 Hb).
    Let ε : r · δ ==> id₁ _ := left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hb).
    Let p
      : rinvunitor r • (r ◃ η) • lassociator r δ r • (ε ▹ r) • lunitor r
        =
        id₂ r
      := internal_triangle2 (pr2 Hb).

    Local Definition cartesian_prod_via_adj_to_cartesian_prod_1cell
                     {x : B}
                     (f g : x --> b)
      : x --> b
      := binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) f g · r.

    Local Definition cartesian_prod_via_adj_to_cartesian_prod_pr1_help
      : r ==> binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))
      := rinvunitor _
         • (r ◃ (binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b)) _ (id₁ b) (id₁ b))^-1)
         • lassociator _ _ _
         • (ε ▹ _)
         • lunitor _.

    Local Definition cartesian_prod_via_adj_to_cartesian_prod_pr1
                     {x : B}
                     (f g : x --> b)
      : cartesian_prod_via_adj_to_cartesian_prod_1cell f g ==> f
      := (_ ◃ cartesian_prod_via_adj_to_cartesian_prod_pr1_help)
         • binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b)) _ f g.

    Local Definition cartesian_prod_via_adj_to_cartesian_prod_pr2_help
      : r ==> binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))
      := rinvunitor _
         • (r ◃ (binprod_ump_1cell_pr2 (pr2 (prod b b)) _ (id₁ b) (id₁ b))^-1)
         • lassociator _ _ _
         • (ε ▹ _)
         • lunitor _.

    Local Definition cartesian_prod_via_adj_to_cartesian_prod_pr2
                     {x : B}
                     (f g : x --> b)
      : cartesian_prod_via_adj_to_cartesian_prod_1cell f g ==> g
      := (_ ◃ cartesian_prod_via_adj_to_cartesian_prod_pr2_help)
         • binprod_ump_1cell_pr2 (pr2 (prod b b)) _ f g.

    
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_prod_via_adj b prod
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hb): B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit (pr1 Hb): id₁ b ==> δ · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hb): r · δ ==> id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))
p:= internal_triangle2 (pr2 Hb): (((rinvunitor r • (r ◃ η)) • lassociator r δ r)
 • (ε ▹ r)) • lunitor r = 
id₂ r
x: B
f, g, k: B ⟦ x, b ⟧
α: k ==> f
β: k ==> g

 • (ε ▹ r)) • lunitor r = 
id₂ r

   • lassociator (δ · r)
       (binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b)

  • (rassociator δ r
       (binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b)
          (id₁ b)) ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))))
 • ((δ ◃ ε) ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))))
• (runitor δ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))) =
id₂
  (binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b)
   · binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))

                  ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b)))))))) =
?b

B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_prod_via_adj b prod
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧

id₂ r

• ((k ◃ η)

 • (ε ▹ r)) • lunitor r = 
id₂ r

ε:= left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hb): r · δ ==> id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))
p:= internal_triangle2 (pr2 Hb): (((rinvunitor r • (r ◃ η)) • lassociator r δ r)
 • (ε ▹ r)) • lunitor r = 
id₂ r
x: B

hom x b
⟦ cartesian_prod_via_adj_to_cartesian_prod_1cell f g,
f ⟧
 exact (cartesian_prod_via_adj_to_cartesian_prod_pr1 f g).

· binprod_cone_pr1 (pr1 (prod b b))
 exact (rassociator _ _ _
                 • (_ ◃ binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b)) _ h₁ h₂)
                 • (binprod_ump_1cell_pr1 (pr2 (prod b b)) _ _ _)^-1).
        
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_prod_via_adj b prod
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hb): B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit (pr1 Hb): id₁ b ==> δ · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hb): r · δ ==> id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))
p:= internal_triangle2 (pr2 Hb): (((rinvunitor r • (r ◃ η)) • lassociator r δ r)
 • (ε ▹ r)) • lunitor r = 
id₂ r
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ y, b ⟧
f · binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) h₁ h₂
· binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b)) ==>
binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (f · h₁) (f · h₂)
· binprod_cone_pr2 (pr1 (prod b b))
 exact (rassociator _ _ _
                 • (_ ◃ binprod_ump_1cell_pr2 (pr2 (prod b b)) _ h₁ h₂)
                 • (binprod_ump_1cell_pr2 (pr2 (prod b b)) _ _ _)^-1).

r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hb): B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit (pr1 Hb): id₁ b ==> δ · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hb): r · δ ==> id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))
p:= internal_triangle2 (pr2 Hb): (((rinvunitor r • (r ◃ η)) • lassociator r δ r)
 • (ε ▹ r)) • lunitor r = 
id₂ r

b: B
Hb: cartesian_prod_via_adj b prod
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hb): B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit (pr1 Hb): id₁ b ==> δ · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hb): r · δ ==> id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))
p:= internal_triangle2 (pr2 Hb): (((rinvunitor r • (r ◃ η)) • lassociator r δ r)
 • (ε ▹ r)) • lunitor r = 
id₂ r
cartesian_prod b

      
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_prod_via_adj b prod
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hb): B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit (pr1 Hb): id₁ b ==> δ · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hb): r · δ ==> id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))
p:= internal_triangle2 (pr2 Hb): (((rinvunitor r • (r ◃ η)) • lassociator r δ r)
 • (ε ▹ r)) • lunitor r = 
id₂ r
∏ x : B, BinProducts (hom x b)
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_prod_via_adj b prod
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hb): B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit (pr1 Hb): id₁ b ==> δ · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hb): r · δ ==> id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))
p:= internal_triangle2 (pr2 Hb): (((rinvunitor r • (r ◃ η)) • lassociator r δ r)
 • (ε ▹ r)) • lunitor r = 
id₂ r
∏ (x y : B) (f : B ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_binproduct (pre_comp b f)

      
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_prod_via_adj b prod
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hb): B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit (pr1 Hb): id₁ b ==> δ · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hb): r · δ ==> id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))
p:= internal_triangle2 (pr2 Hb): (((rinvunitor r • (r ◃ η)) • lassociator r δ r)
 • (ε ▹ r)) • lunitor r = 
id₂ r
∏ x : B, BinProducts (hom x b)
 exact cartesian_prod_via_adj_to_cartesian_prod_obj.
      
B: bicat
T: bifinal_obj B
prod: has_binprod B
b: B
Hb: cartesian_prod_via_adj b prod
δ:= binprod_ump_1cell (pr2 (prod b b)) (id₁ b) (id₁ b): B ⟦ b, pr1 (prod b b) ⟧
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 Hb): B ⟦ pr1 (prod b b), b ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit (pr1 Hb): id₁ b ==> δ · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit (pr1 Hb): r · δ ==> id₁ (pr1 (prod b b))
p:= internal_triangle2 (pr2 Hb): (((rinvunitor r • (r ◃ η)) • lassociator r δ r)
 • (ε ▹ r)) • lunitor r = 
id₂ r
∏ (x y : B) (f : B ⟦ x, y ⟧),
preserves_binproduct (pre_comp b f)
 exact @cartesian_prod_via_adj_to_cartesian_prod_preserves.
    Defined.
  End FromAdj.
